message:
Implement P3.3: sqlite-wasm Integration

- Add database.js module for browser SQLite queries
- Support OPFS storage (Chrome/Firefox) with in-memory fallback
- Implement scoped query pattern for memory leak prevention
- Add pre-built queries for common operations:
  - getStatistics() - conversation/message counts
  - getRecentConversations() - paginated listing
  - getConversation() / getConversationMessages() - detail view
  - searchConversations() - FTS5 full-text search
  - getConversationsByAgent/Workspace/TimeRange() - filters
- Include memory monitoring (getMemoryUsage, checkMemoryPressure)
- Add proper cleanup with closeDatabase()

Part of Phase 3: Web Viewer (coding_agent_session_search-uok7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
